settings.codexResets.autoRedeem.descript: Codex 周限额阻塞时自动兑换已保存的 reset
settings.codexResets.autoRedeem.label: 自动兑换已保存重置
不提示直接使用已保存的 reset
settings.codexResets.keepCredits.descrip: 从不 auto-spend below this many saved resets (0 = the last credit may be spent automatically).
settings.codexResets.keepCredits.label: 自动兑换保留的额度
settings.codexResets.minBlockedMinutes.d: 开ly auto-redeem when the natural weekly reset is at least this many 分钟 away (don't spend a ~30-day credit to save a short wait).
settings.codexResets.minBlockedMinutes.l: 自动兑换最小阻塞时间
settings.exa.enableResearcher.descriptio: 启用 the Exa researcher tool for AI-powered deep research
settings.exa.enableResearcher.label: Exa 研究员
settings.exa.enableSearch.description: 启用 Exa basic search, deep search, code search, and crawl tools
settings.exa.enableSearch.label: Exa 搜索
settings.exa.enableWebsets.description: 启用 Exa webset management and enrichment tools
settings.exa.enableWebsets.label: Exa Websets
settings.exa.searchDelayMs.description: 最小 delay between Exa web search requests in 毫秒; set 0 to disable pacing
settings.exa.searchDelayMs.label: Exa 搜索延迟
settings.provider.appendOnlyContext.desc: Cache system prompt + tool specs and keep an append-only message log so provider prefix caches (DeepSeek, Xiaomi/SGLang, Anthropic) hit at maximum rate. 自动 enables for known prefix-cache providers.
settings.provider.appendOnlyContext.opti: 启用 for known prefix-cache providers (recommended)
settings.providers.antigravityEndpoint.d: Google Antigravity 提供方端点路由策略
settings.providers.antigravityEndpoint.o: 优先生产端点，5xx/429 时回退沙箱
settings.providers.fetch.description: fetch/read URL 工具的读取器后端优先级
settings.providers.fetch.label: 网页抓取提供商
settings.providers.fetch.options.auto.de: 优先级：native > trafilatura > lynx > parallel > jina
进程内 HTML→Markdown 转换器
settings.providers.fireworksTier.label: Fireworks 等级
settings.providers.fireworksTier.options: 优先服务路径：更高可靠性，按 token 溢价计费
settings.providers.image.description: 图片生成的首选提供方
settings.providers.image.label: 图片提供商
settings.providers.image.options.auto.de: 优先级：GPT 模型 > Antigravity > xAI > OpenRouter > Gemini
使用当前 GPT 模型
settings.providers.image.options.xai.des: 需要 xAI Grok OAuth 或 XAI_API_KEY
settings.providers.kimiApiFormat.descrip: Kimi Code 提供方 API 格式
settings.providers.kimiApiFormat.label: Kimi API 格式
settings.providers.ollama-cloud.maxConcu: 最大 concurrent Ollama Cloud subagent runs per process; 0 disables the provider-specific limit
settings.providers.openaiWebsockets.desc: OpenAI Codex 模型的 WebSocket 策略
settings.providers.openaiWebsockets.opti: 使用模型/提供方默认行为
禁用 websockets for OpenAI Codex models
settings.providers.openrouterVariant.des: 默认 routing-variant suffix appended to OpenRouter model IDs (overridden when the selector already names a variant)
settings.providers.openrouterVariant.opt: 无后缀，使用 OpenRouter 默认路由
优先最便宜可用提供方
settings.providers.tinyModel.label: 轻量模型
settings.providers.tinyModelDevice.descr: ONNX execution provider for local tiny models (titles + memory). 默认 uses CPU-only inference. The PI_TINY_DEVICE env var overrides this.
settings.providers.tinyModelDevice.label: 轻量模型设备
settings.providers.tinyModelDtype.descri: ONNX quantization/precision for local tiny models. 默认 uses each model's shipped dtype (q4); lower precision is faster, higher is more faithful. The PI_TINY_DTYPE env var overrides this.
settings.providers.tinyModelDtype.label: 轻量模型精度
settings.providers.tts.description: tts 工具的后端：本地 Kokoro-82M 或 xAI Grok Voice
settings.providers.tts.label: 文字转语音提供商
settings.providers.tts.options.auto.desc: 优先本地 TTS，有凭证时 .mp3 输出走 xAI
settings.providers.tts.options.local.des: 开-device neural TTS (Kokoro-82M); output is WAV/PCM16
settings.providers.tts.options.xai.descr: 需要 xAI Grok OAuth 或 XAI_API_KEY
settings.providers.tts.options.xai.label: xAI Grok 语音
settings.providers.unexpectedStopModel.d: 意外停止检测分类器模型配置
settings.providers.webSearch.description: web_search 工具的首选提供方
settings.providers.webSearch.label: 网页搜索提供商

settings.providers.webSearchExclude.labe: 排除的网页搜索提供商

settings.speech.enabled.description: 通过扬声器朗读助手输出
settings.speech.enabled.label: 语音朗读
